title: CashFlowInput
description: Shared calculator input schema for ecommerce ad spend cash-flow forecasting.

starting_cash.description: Cash currently available in the business bank account.

daily_ad_spend.description: Planned or current daily paid advertising spend.

expected_roas.description: Expected revenue multiple from ad spend. This is not the same as available cash.

gross_margin_percent.description: Gross margin after cost of goods sold.

payout_lag_days.description: Number of days between order/revenue generation and cash payout.

inventory_supplier_payment.description: Upcoming inventory, supplier, or purchase order cash outflow.

inventory_payment_day.description: Forecast day when the inventory or supplier payment leaves cash.

refund_adjustment_percent.description: Estimated percent drag from refunds, disputes, adjustments, fees, or leakage.

forecast_window_days.description: Forecast window length. Default is 14 days.

minimum_cash_buffer.description: Optional minimum cash balance to preserve when calculating safer ad spend.
